GHSA-P4V8-RW59-93CQ.fccf7650d9709342882862c0ecd147428e98e6f1:
Enforce HTML escaping of all confirmation / warning / error messages

Fixes GHSA-p4v8-rw59-93cq

Ensure that all messages are handled through `wagtail.admin.messages` (which uses a template that correctly escapes messages and outputs a safe string) rather than `django.contrib.messages`, and remove the `|safe` filter when outputting messages in base.html (which should not be necessary, if all messages that intentionally contain HTML are constructed as safe strings).

CVE-2024-39317.8667318326fa91b07b089f75e2c6d430cd7e7e87:
Require word boundaries before search query filters (CVE-2024-39317)

Requiring a word boundary before the start of a filter prevents backtracking, as substrings of the filter name are no longer valid filter names.

This also makes matching around an order of magnitude faster.

CVE-2020-10379.8939583e982fa0888bca1eccc5c8467f19d4e5d1:
Expand Pillow dependency to include 7.x

This allows users on the 2.7 LTS branch to upgrade Pillow to address [CVE-2020-10379](https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2020-10379), as Pillow 6.x is EOL (https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/issues/4750).
